expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: REPORT_STATE and resume semantics remain stable
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the benchmark focus is explicitly stated as “REPORT_STATE and resume semantics remain stable” and the Phase 0 contract section explicitly enumerates REPORT_STATE values and resume-mode mapping: “Classify `REPORT_STATE`…”, and “required resume semantics mapping: full_regenerate… smart_refresh… reuse/resume…”. It concludes: “PASS (contract-level). The output and behavior expectations are aligned with phase0 and explicitly cover `REPORT_STATE` and resume semantics.”

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase0
expectations.evidence: result.md identifies “Primary phase under test: phase0” and evaluates “Phase Contract Check — Phase 0 Alignment (Blocking)” describing required Phase 0 outputs and gates (runtime_setup files, REPORT_STATE classification, apply_user_choice flow). It concludes: “Conclusion (Phase 0 contract alignment): PASS (contract-level).” and later: “Output aligns with primary phase phase0: YES.”
